case_title: ARAJ, ADMON et al vs. LI, PAUL et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LI, PAUL PUN, HORACE YATS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARAJ, ADMON ARAJ, VERA AS TO DEFENDANT LI, PAUL OEX HEARING SET FOR JUL-31-2002 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 612
